extension.summary: Syncher - All-in-One: Movies, TV, Sports, Music (AI), Podcasts, Audiobooks, Radio
extension.description: Syncher v3.4.0 by zeus768 - The ultimate all-in-one Kodi addon. Movies and TV Shows via Trakt/TMDB with scene release scrapers. Sports Highlights from replay sites. Massive Music section: AI Daily Playlists powered by Emergent Universal Key (like Spotify daily mixes), mood/decade playlists, Deezer charts/genres/artists, user playlists with shuffle/sort/export. Live Radio (30,000+ stations via Radio Browser API). Podcasts via iTunes with RSS episode streaming. Audiobooks via LibriVox and Internet Archive with chapter-by-chapter playback. Resolves through Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox. AI features powered by Emergent Universal Key.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content. A debrid service is recommended. AI features require an Emergent Universal Key.
extension.news:
v3.4.0 (2026) - NEW: Podcasts section (iTunes Search API) * Top podcasts, browse by 19 genres * Search podcasts by name * Stream episodes directly via RSS feeds * Episode metadata with dates and durations - NEW: Audiobooks section (LibriVox + Internet Archive) * 50+ popular classic audiobooks * New arrivals from LibriVox * Browse by 20 genres * Search by title or author * Internet Archive search (millions of free audiobooks) * Chapter-by-chapter playback with Play All * Dual-source: LibriVox API + Internet Archive API - Updated main menu: Movies, TV, Sports, Music, Podcasts, Audiobooks - Updated search menu: includes podcast and audiobook search - AI features use Emergent Universal Key only
v3.3.0 (2026) - AI Daily Playlists (14 themes, mood, decades, similar artist) - Live Radio via Radio Browser API - Enhanced playlists (shuffle, sort, export, import)
v3.2.0 (2026) - Deezer Music section (genres, artists, albums, charts, playlists)
v2.0.0 (2026) - Initial release: Movies, TV, Sports, Debrid, Trakt
